data.title: Lenovo launches real-time store visibility and AI-driven support for retail to combat revenue loss. AI aids in enhancing online experiences and conversion rates. Challenges persist in adopting AI for daily operations.
data.description: In New York, retailers face revenue losses whenever an online store experiences downtime, a system malfunctions, or frontline staff lack necessary tools. The rise of generative AI platforms and AI agents presents a chance to enhance online retail experiences and boost conversion rates. Despite this potential for AI to drive improved margins and competitive edge, many retailers struggle to effectively implement experimental strategies into daily operations.

data.title: Tahoe Therapeutics, Arc Institute, and Biohub collaborate to create the largest perturbation dataset for virtual cell models. Multi-million dollar commitment.
data.description: In a groundbreaking collaboration, Tahoe Therapeutics, Arc Institute, and Biohub have joined forces to create the most extensive single-cell dataset for virtual cell models. This initiative, based in San Francisco, Palo Alto, and Redwood City, is backed by a substantial multi-million dollar investment from each organization. The project marks a significant milestone in research, aiming to enhance perturbation-rich data for advanced cell modeling. This unprecedented partnership is the first of its kind at this magnitude, building upon prior successes with perturbational datasets.

data.title: BONDS' Flying Roos team, co-owned by Hugh Jackman and Ryan Reynolds, launches SailGP season with a humorous video briefing.
data.description: In Sydney, as the sixth season of SailGP begins in Perth, BONDS has launched a new video showcasing BONDS Flying Roos co-owners Hugh Jackman and Ryan Reynolds, motivating Driver Tom Slingsby and his team with a humorous team "briefing" to kickstart the championship. Produced by Maximum Effort, the video focuses on the playful brand essence of BONDS and the exceptional talent of the team. The video features the co-owners, athletes, and the elite crew, capturing the spirit of the upcoming season.

data.title: U.S. Plastics Pact releases 2024–25 Impact Report showcasing progress towards circular plastics system, emphasizing collaboration.
data.description: In Pittsburgh, the U.S. Plastics Pact (USPP) has unveiled its 2024-25 Impact Report, outlining advancements towards a circular plastics system in the U.S. The report emphasizes the need for ongoing dedication and teamwork to achieve significant results. Building on the USPP Roadmap to 2025, the organization is transitioning to a more action-oriented approach with Roadmap 2.0, driven by its members. This shift comes at a crucial time, as the USPP strives to make a larger impact and push towards a sustainable plastics industry.

data.title: Tennessee orders Polymarket, Kalshi, Crypto.com to close sports prediction markets, refund bets.
data.description: Several prominent prediction market platforms, including Polymarket, have been instructed to cease all activities related to sports events in a particular state. The order mandates the immediate closure of sports-related markets on these platforms and the reimbursement of any outstanding wagers made by users. This decision impacts numerous users who engage in predictive betting on these platforms.
Fitch Ratings: The yen is expected to recover moderately from historical lows.

data.title: Premium Guard Inc. (PGI) named 2025 E-Commerce Vendor of the Year by Advance Auto Parts in Memphis, TN.
data.description: In Memphis, Tennessee on January 12, 2026, Premium Guard Inc. (PGI), a prominent filter manufacturer and supplier, received the prestigious title of 2025 E-Commerce Vendor of the Year from Advance Auto Parts. This recognition was announced at Advance Auto Parts' yearly vendor appreciation event.

data.title: BitMine adds 24,266 ETH, worth $13 billion, but rally may end if shareholder vote fails to increase shares.
data.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies (NYSE: BMNR) recently obtained 24,266 Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH), raising their total holdings to 4.17 million ETH valued at $13 billion. However, Chairman Tom Lee cautioned that their acquisition pace may decelerate unless given permission from shareholders to boost authorized shares. BitMine must secure 50.1% shareholder approval to continue purchasing ETH. The company is nearing the limit of its current 500 million authorized shares, which will impede further ETH accumulation once all shares are sold out. A crucial shareholder vote is scheduled for Thursday at the Wynn Las Vegas, necessitating the approval of 50.1% of all outstanding shares for the increase in authorized shares to be granted. Lee highlighted the difficulty in achieving this due to the demanding requirement, emphasizing the urgency in seeking the authorization promptly to avert a halt in their ETH acquisitions.

data.title: Johnson & Johnson reports strong results in colorectal cancer trial with Rybrevant. Positive outcomes support Phase 3 studies. (character count: 121)
data.description: Over the weekend, Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) released new extended findings from the Phase 1b/2 OrigAMI-1 trial. The study is investigating Rybrevant (amivantamab-vmjw) combined with FOLFOX or FOLFIRI chemotherapy for RAS/BRAF wild-type metastatic colorectal cancer. The company highlighted promising anti-tumor activity, lasting responses, and minimal treatment-related discontinuations in the trial, indicating the need for more investigation in Phase 3 trials for first- and second-line colorectal cancer treatments. The outcomes were disclosed at the 2026 American Society of Clinical Oncology Gastrointestinal Cancers Symposium. The data demonstrated that at a median follow-up of 16 months, amivantamab plus FOLFOX (n=20) or FOLFIRI (n=23) achieved a confirmed overall response rate (ORR)... For further details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Mercury General Corp. (NYSE: MCY) to report Q4 2025 results on Feb 17, 2026 after market close.
data.description: Today, Mercury General Corporation (NYSE: MCY) announced that it will release its fourth quarter 2025 earnings report after markets close on February 17, 2026. The Company will issue a press release detailing its financial results for the mentioned period.

data.title: Hippocratic AI strengthens life sciences leadership with Grove AI acquisition, executive appointments, and BCG collaboration.
data.description: Palo Alto, California - Hippocratic AI, a company specializing in GenAI technology, has broadened its presence in the life sciences sector with a significant acquisition. The expansion also includes the appointment of key executives and advisors, as well as the initiation of a strategic collaboration with BCG. This move signifies a strong push towards growth in the industry and solidifies the company's position as a major player.

data.title: Global Off-Highway Vehicle Telematics Market report offers insights from 30 executives of leading companies, covering 48 OEMs.
data.description: Dublin - A report titled "The Global Off-Highway Vehicle Telematics Market - 7th Edition" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report is considered the leading source of information regarding telematics solutions in industries such as construction, mining, agriculture, and forestry. It provides valuable insights for various stakeholders including telematics vendors, vehicle manufacturers, telecom operators, investors, consultants, and government agencies. This comprehensive report offers crucial data and analysis on the global off-highway vehicle telematics market.
